definitions: vt. 忽视 (在此语境下的释义)

examples.text: One reason is that in the first few decades of independence, many African governments neglected farming as they focused on industrialising their economies.
examples.explanation: 一个原因是，在独立后的头几十年里，许多非洲政府忽视了农业，而专注于经济工业化。

reviewSessions.example_text: One reason is that in the first few decades of independence, many African governments neglected farming as they focused on industrialising their economies.
expected_definitions: vt. 忽视 (在此语境下的释义)
reviewSessions.feedback: 正确。“忽略”与此处 neglect 的“忽视”意思一致。
matched_points: 表达了“忽视/忽略”的核心含义
符合例句中政府没有重视农业的语境
